title: Fossil Discovery in Patagonia Reveals New Species of Horned Turtle
description: Paleontologists have identified a new species of meiolaniform turtle from northern Patagonia, Argentina, that lived during the Maastrichtian age, just before the asteroid-triggered mass extinction that wiped out all non-avian dinosaurs.

title: Israelis order Tyre residents to evacuate ancient Lebanese city
description: A city that was besieged by Alexander the Great and the Crusaders is now under attack by Israeli forces trying to destroy Iran-backed militant group Hezbollah.

title: Israelis order Tyre residents to evacuate ancient Lebanese city
description: TYRE, Lebanon — Residents of this ancient and embattled city were being forced Tuesday to choose between two bitter options: stay and risk getting killed by Israeli airstrikes, or leave and become refugees in their own country

title: Cape rangers helping archaeologists uncover ancient Indigenous rock art
description: Lama Lama rangers have been working with archaeologists and scientists to document ancient Indigenous rock artwork and engravings. The art dated up to 6000 years old is being uncovered on Lama Lama Sea Country, around Princess Charlotte Bay on the Cape. Scattered across one of the most culturally rich parts of the vast Great Barrier [...]
